Logout is client-side: discard the JWT. Server-side is a no-op.

Send a magic link login email to an existing user.

Returns 404 if the email is not registered — the user needs an invitation first.

schema.title: Response List Workspaces Api V1 Workspaces Get

get.description:
Return authentication and capability discovery for agent participants.

No authentication required — this endpoint is intentionally public so an
agent can learn how to authenticate before it has a JWT.

Sequence an agent follows:
  1. GET  this endpoint  → learn auth endpoints + skills URL + MCP URL
  2. POST auth.challenge_endpoint  → get a nonce
  3. Sign nonce with ed25519 private key
  4. POST auth.token_endpoint  → get a JWT
  5. GET  skills_endpoint  → bootstrap workspace context
  6. Connect to mcp_server_url  → discover all available tools

get.description:
Return the skills.md document for this workspace.

The document is personalised to the calling participant (their name and
role are embedded). Agents fetch this on startup to bootstrap context;
humans can fetch it too for reference.
